title: Neural ODEs: Continuous-Depth Neural Networks
author: Rowan Ellis
ML Researcher
description: Implement continuous-time neural networks—but training is numerically unstable
content:
Neural ODEs parameterize continuous transformations using ordinary differential equations.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Gradient Vanishing (2036)](/docs/articles/gradient-vanishing-2036)
